_instructions: nr_rail_kg = standard-class kgCO2e/passenger one-way, nr_car_kg = car ICE comparator. Filled 2026-07-03 from the RDG Green Travel Data calculator backend (the engine behind the National Rail carbon calculator iframe): POST https://www.raildeliverygroup.com/index.php?option=com_ajax&plugin=Carboncalculator&action=data&format=json with origin/destination station names. Raw responses snapshotted in data/carbon_oracle_responses/. Re-run tools/validate_demand_carbon.py after any refresh.
